history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with a modern undercut hairstyle, wearing a dark grey t-shirt with rolled-up sleeves and a black bracelet on his left wrist, takes a mirror selfie in a public restroom. He is holding a smartphone with a colorful, sticker-covered case in his right hand, partially obscuring his face. The background of the restroom features light brown tiled walls, partitioned stalls with light wood doors, and a white urinal visible to the right. The ceiling has recessed lighting and a square air vent. The lighting is warm and slightly dim, casting soft shadows and creating a reflective sheen on the mirror and tiled surfaces. The overall mood is casual and contemporary.
